data.name: Welcome to Maison Chichigami
data.detailed_description:
On a quest to restore your weary body in the mountains of Japan, you nearly perish and arrive at the steps of Maison Chichigami. There, you earn the favor of Chichigami Manami and her daughters, who hire you as a live-in tutor. Heal your body and soul living a life of luxury in the company of absolute goddesses! Fall in love with the matronly Manami, the playful Rio, the bookish Kana, and the diligent Ai! But watch your step as you explore the mansion. The Chichigami lineage is steeped in history, and dark secrets may be lying in wait...Search the vast estate of Maison Chichigami! Wander about the mansion over the course of a week and socialize with the mansion's various residents. Watch the story unfold before your very eyes!

Gorgeous animation!

Gawk at the beautiful residents of Maison Chichigami and their highly animated expressions! Get up close and personal and (respectfully) appreciate their massive charms!

Experience the Story!

Traverse your way to the ending by experiencing the story through immersive narration. Each character has a unique personality that brings the story to life!

data.short_description: Deep in the mountains, there is said to be a legendary hot spring: called the Spirit Spring. Becoming lost on the way to the spring, you are rescued by a mysterious, reclusive family. But what secrets does this family hide away in their manor?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Kamichichi, All Rights Reserved.
